title: Unified partition() entry point with auto-routing
detail: Single function routes to 30+ format-specific partitioners via FileType enum and libmagic detection

title: Rich FileType enum as self-describing registry
detail: Each file type carries partitioner path, dependencies, extras, MIME types, extensions — adding format = 1 enum member

title: Strategy pattern with graceful fallback
detail: AUTO/FAST/OCR_ONLY/HI_RES with dependency checking and automatic degradation

title: Element type hierarchy with spatial metadata
detail: Dataclass elements carry coordinates, data source, permissions. 1111-line module

title: Ontology V2 acknowledged as over-engineered
detail: TODO from 'Pluto': OntologyElement is the only needed class, rest could be simplified

title: Chunking with table isolation and header repetition
detail: 1801-line chunking module. Tables isolated from text, headers carried across continuation chunks

title: Grype vulnerability scanner configured
detail: CVE-2024-11053 explicitly ignored. Automated scanning in place

title: Chainguard wolfi-base Docker image
detail: Security-focused base image, non-root user, multi-stage build

title: Decompressed size limit enforced
detail: 200MB MAX_DECOMPRESSED_SIZE prevents decompression bombs

title: Pre-commit with black + ruff + flake8
detail: Consistent code formatting at line-length=100, linting, file checks

title: Renovate automated dependency updates
detail: Configured for automated PR-based dependency management

title: Conventional commits enforced
detail: CONTRIBUTING.md requires conventional commit format for PR titles

title: External docs site at docs.unstructured.io
detail: Comprehensive documentation covering open-source, platform, connectors, concepts

title: Performance benchmarking documentation
detail: S3-backed benchmarks with architecture/instance/hash tagging, py-spy profiling

title: 113 test files mirroring source structure
detail: Unit tests for every module, benchmarks directory

title: 40+ connector golden-file snapshot tests
detail: Expected markdown output for Salesforce, Notion, Confluence, Jira, etc.

title: Extremely active release cadence
detail: 5 releases in 12 days (v0.22.4 through v0.22.16). 16+ releases in v0.22.x series

title: 139 contributors, 14.4K stars
detail: Strong community engagement and adoption signal

title: Embedding module deprecated — moved to unstructured-ingest
detail: Architectural boundary: unstructured=extraction, ingest=pipeline+embedding+connectors

title: Modern Python tooling: uv + hatch + ruff
detail: Latest-gen Python dependency management and build system
